Container.Name: SparkyFitness---Backend
Container.Overview:
SparkyFitness is a comprehensive fitness tracking and management application designed to help users monitor their nutrition, exercise, and body measurements. It provides tools for daily progress tracking, goal setting, and insightful reports to support a healthy lifestyle.
This is the backend container.
Container.DonateText: If you like an app, please donate to the respective developers; I'm just writing XML files over here. But if you have some change to spare afterwards, maybe chuck me a buck?

Config.Name: Postgres - Host
Config.Description: Hostname or IP address of the Postgres server

Config.Name: Postgres - Port
Config.Description: Port number for the Postgres server

Config.Name: Postgres - Database Name
Config.Description: Name of the Postgres database

Config.Name: Postgres - Username
Config.Description: Username for the Postgres database

Config.Name: Postgres - Password
Config.Description: Password for the Postgres database

Config.Name: Postgres - Username
Config.Description: Username for the Postgres database

Config.Name: Postgres - Password
Config.Description: Password for the Postgres database

Config.Name: Garmin Microservice URL
Config.Description: URL of the Garmin microservice (e.g., http://IP_ADDRESS:8000)

Config.Name: Frontend URL
Config.Description: URL where the frontend is accessible (e.g., http://IP_ADDRESS:3004)

Config.Name: Security - Encryption Key
Config.Description: A 64-character hex string used to encrypt data. Generate with 'openssl rand -hex 32'

Config.Name: BETTER_AUTH_SECRET
Config.Description: A secret key for signing JSON Web Tokens. Generate with 'openssl rand -base64 32'

Config.Name: Disable User Signups
Config.Description: Set to true to disable new user registrations

Config.Name: Force Email Logins
Config.Description: Force email/password login to be enabled, overriding any in-app settings. This is a fail-safe to prevent being locked out if OIDC is misconfigured.

Config.Name: Admin Email
Config.Description: Automatically grant admin rights to this email

Config.Name: Email - SMTP Host
Config.Description: SMTP server hostname for sending emails

Config.Name: Email - SMTP Port
Config.Description: SMTP server port (default: 587)

Config.Name: Email - SMTP Secure
Config.Description: Set to true if the SMTP server requires a secure connection (TLS)

Config.Name: Email - SMTP User
Config.Description: SMTP server username for authentication

Config.Name: Email - SMTP Password
Config.Description: SMTP server password for authentication

Config.Name: Email - From Address
Config.Description: Email address that emails will be sent from

Config.Name: Backup Storage
Config.Description: Path to the backup storage folder

Config.Name: Uploads Storage
Config.Description: Path to the uploads storage folder

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Logging level

Config.Name: Node Environment
Config.Description: Node environment setting

Config.Name: Internal API Port
Config.Description: Internal ort for API communication. Not recommended to change.
